006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor.DataType.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.math.*;
025import java.util.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
033
034/**
035 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link CborParser}.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
038 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
039 * </ul>
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
042 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Cbor">CBOR Basics</a>
043 * </ul>
044 */
045@SuppressWarnings({
046   "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
047   "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
048   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
049   "resource"  // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's parser session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
050})
051public class CborParserSession extends InputStreamParserSession implements TokenReadable, ArrayRecordReadable {
052
053   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
054   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
055
056   /**
057    * Builder class.
058    */
059   public static class Builder extends InputStreamParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
060
061      final boolean nativeMode;
062
063      /**
064       * Constructor
065       *
066       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
067       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
068       */
069      protected Builder(CborParser ctx) {
070         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
071         this.nativeMode = ctx.isNativeMode();
072      }
073
074      @Override
075      public CborParserSession build() {
076         return new CborParserSession(this);
077      }
078
079   }
080
081   /**
082    * Creates a new builder for this object.
083    *
084    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
085    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
086    * @return A new builder.
087    */
088   public static Builder create(CborParser ctx) {
089      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
090   }
091
092   private final boolean nativeMode;
093
094   /**
095    * Constructor.
096    *
097    * @param builder The builder for this object.
098    */
099   protected CborParserSession(Builder builder) {
100      super(builder);
101      this.nativeMode = builder.nativeMode;
102   }
103
104   /**
105    * Opens a low-level pull-parser cursor over a CBOR document, bound to this live session.
106    *
107    * <p>
108    * CBOR is already a token-shaped wire format (RFC 8949), so this cursor maps almost directly
109    * onto {@link CborInputStream#readDataType()}.  Indefinite-length containers
110    * (<c>0x9F</c> / <c>0xBF</c>) are handled by tracking a sentinel element-count of -1 on the
111    * container stack and emitting END_* on encountering the BREAK byte.
112    *
113    * <h5 class='section'>Builder properties honored:</h5>
114    * <c>autoCloseStreams</c>, <c>unbuffered</c>.
115    *
116    * <h5 class='section'>Builder properties NOT honored:</h5>
117    * <c>listener</c>, <c>debugOutputLines</c>, <c>consumes</c>, swaps, {@code @Schema}.
118    *
119    * @param input The input.
120    * @return A new {@link CborTokenReader}.
121    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
122    */
123   @SuppressWarnings({
124      "java:S2095" // ParserPipe lifecycle is transferred to the returned CborTokenReader, which closes it via its own close(); the caller owns the cursor via try-with-resources.
125   })
126   @Override /* TokenReadable */
127   public TokenReader parseTokens(Object input) throws IOException {
128      var pipe = new ParserPipe(input, isDebug(), isAutoCloseStreams(), isUnbuffered(), null);
129      return new CborTokenReader(pipe, this).setNativeMode(nativeMode);
130   }
131
132   /**
133    * Streaming array-element {@link RecordReader} backed by {@link CborTokenReader}.
134    * Memory is O(1) in the array length &mdash; CBOR's indefinite-length array support
135    * (0x9F .. 0xFF) makes the wrapper trivial.
136    *
137    * @param input The input.
138    * @return A new element-streamed {@link RecordReader}.
139    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
140    */
141   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
142   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
143      try {
144         return StreamingArrayRecord.reader(parseTokens(input));
145      } catch (ParseException e) {
146         throw new IOException(e);
147      }
148   }
149
150   /*
151    * Workhorse method.
152    */
153   @SuppressWarnings({
154      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
155      "java:S6541"  // Single-threaded session contexts do not require synchronization
156   })
157   <T> T parseAnything(ClassMeta<?> eType, CborInputStream is, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
158
159      if (eType == null)
160         eType = object();
161      var swap = (ObjectSwap<T,Object>)eType.getSwap(this);
162      var builder = (BuilderSwap<T,Object>)eType.getBuilderSwap(this);
163      ClassMeta<?> sType = null;
164      if (nn(builder))
165         sType = builder.getBuilderClassMeta(this);
166      else if (nn(swap))
167         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
168      else
169         sType = eType;
170
171      if (sType.isOptional())
172         return (T)o(parseAnything(eType.getElementType(), is, outer, pMeta));
173
174      setCurrentClass(sType);
175
176      Object o = null;
177      DataType dt = is.readDataType();
178      long len = is.readLength();
179
180      // Handle CBOR semantic tags: skip tag, parse following data item
181      while (dt == TAG) {
182         dt = is.readDataType();
183         len = is.readLength();
184      }
185
186      if (dt != NULL) {
187         if (dt == BOOLEAN)
188            o = is.readBoolean();
189         else if (dt == UINT || dt == NINT) {
190            // Surface unsigned 64-bit by the target Java type (175fc GAP-1, aligned with the
191            // proto-binary R5 decision): a BigInteger field carries the full magnitude (values
192            // beyond signed long widen losslessly); any other type keeps the raw 64-bit bits as
193            // a long (preserving the native int64 round-trip used by epoch/millis temporal and
194            // duration values).
195            o = sType.inner() == BigInteger.class ? is.readBigInteger() : (Object)is.readLong();
196         }
197         else if (dt == FLOAT) {
198            // Prefer double for conversion; single-precision if target is Float
199            if (sType.isFloat() && !sType.isDouble())
200               o = is.readFloat();
201            else
202               o = is.readDouble();
203         } else if (dt == STRING)
204            o = trim(is.readString());
205         else if (dt == BINARY)
206            o = is.readBinary();
207         else if (dt == ARRAY && sType.isObject()) {
208            var jl = newGenericList();
209            for (var i = 0; shouldContinueContainer(is, len, i); i++)
210               jl.add(parseAnything(object(), is, outer, pMeta));
211            o = jl;
212         } else if (dt == MAP && sType.isObject()) {
213            var jm = newGenericMap();
214            for (var i = 0; shouldContinueContainer(is, len, i); i++)
215               jm.put((String)parseAnything(string(), is, outer, pMeta), parseAnything(object(), is, jm, pMeta));
216            o = cast(jm, pMeta, eType);
217         }
218
219         if (sType.isObject()) {
220            // Do nothing.
221         } else if (nn(builder) || sType.canCreateNewBean(outer)) {
222            if (dt == MAP) {
223               BeanMap m = builder == null ? newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()) : toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType));
224               for (var i = 0; shouldContinueContainer(is, len, i); i++) {
225                  String pName = parseAnything(string(), is, m.getBean(false), null);
226                  var bpm = m.getPropertyMeta(pName);
227                  if (bpm == null) {
228                     if (pName.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName(eType)))
229                        parseAnything(string(), is, null, null);
230                     else
231                        onUnknownProperty(pName, m, parseAnything(string(), is, null, null));
232                  } else {
233                     var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) bpm.getBeanInfo();
234                     Object value = parseAnything(cm, is, m.getBean(false), bpm);
235                     setName(cm, value, pName);
236                     try {
237                        bpm.set(m, pName, value);
238                     } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
239                        onBeanSetterException(pMeta, e);
240                        throw e;
241                     }
242                  }
243               }
244               o = builder == null ? m.getBean() : builder.build(this, m.getBean(), eType);
245            } else {
246               throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid data type {0} encountered for parse type {1}", dt, sType);
247            }
248         } else if (sType.isMap()) {
249            if (dt == MAP) {
250               Map m = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType));
251               for (var i = 0; shouldContinueContainer(is, len, i); i++) {
252                  Object key = parseAnything(sType.getKeyType(), is, outer, pMeta);
253                  var vt = sType.getValueType();
254                  Object value = parseAnything(vt, is, m, pMeta);
255                  setName(vt, value, key);
256                  m.put(key, value);
257               }
258               o = m;
259            } else {
260               throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid data type {0} encountered for parse type {1}", dt, sType);
261            }
262         } else if (sType.isBoolean() || sType.isCharSequence() || sType.isChar() || sType.isNumber() || sType.isByteArray()) {
263            // Merged scalar tier: one CBOR data type (BOOLEAN/UINT/NINT/FLOAT/STRING/BINARY) covers
264            // many scalar Java types — the read already happened above and convertToType narrows.
265            o = convertToType(o, sType);
266         } else if (sType.isDate()) {
267            o = parseDate(String.valueOf(o), sType);
268         } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
269            o = parseCalendar(String.valueOf(o), sType);
270         } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
271            o = parseTemporal(String.valueOf(o), sType);
272         } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
273            o = parseDuration(String.valueOf(o));
274         } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
275            o = parsePeriod(String.valueOf(o));
276         } else if (sType.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(outer) && dt == STRING) {
277            o = sType.newInstanceFromString(outer, o == null ? "" : o.toString());
278         } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
279            if (dt == MAP) {
280               var m = newGenericMap();
281               for (var i = 0; shouldContinueContainer(is, len, i); i++)
282                  m.put((String)parseAnything(string(), is, outer, pMeta), parseAnything(object(), is, m, pMeta));
283               o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
284            } else if (dt == ARRAY) {
285               Collection l = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection)sType.newInstance() : newGenericList());
286               for (var i = 0; shouldContinueContainer(is, len, i); i++)
287                  l.add(parseAnything(sType.getElementType(), is, l, pMeta));
288               o = l;
289            } else {
290               throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid data type {0} encountered for parse type {1}", dt, sType);
291            }
292         } else if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs()) {
293            if (dt == MAP) {
294               var m = newGenericMap();
295               for (var i = 0; shouldContinueContainer(is, len, i); i++)
296                  m.put((String)parseAnything(string(), is, outer, pMeta), parseAnything(object(), is, m, pMeta));
297               o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
298            } else if (dt == ARRAY) {
299               Collection l = (sType.isCollection() && sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection)sType.newInstance() : newGenericList());
300               for (var i = 0; shouldContinueContainer(is, len, i); i++)
301                  l.add(parseAnything(sType.isArgs() ? sType.getArg(i) : sType.getElementType(), is, l, pMeta));
302               o = toArray(sType, l);
303            } else {
304               throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid data type {0} encountered for parse type {1}", dt, sType);
305            }
306         } else if (dt == MAP) {
307            var m = newGenericMap();
308            for (var i = 0; shouldContinueContainer(is, len, i); i++)
309               m.put((String)parseAnything(string(), is, outer, pMeta), parseAnything(object(), is, m, pMeta));
310            if (m.containsKey(getBeanTypePropertyName(eType)))
311               o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
312            else if (nn(sType.getProxyInvocationHandler()))
313               o = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()).load(m).getBean();
314            else
315               throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason());
316         } else if (dt == UNDEFINED || dt == SIMPLE) {
317            // Treat as null for unknown simple values
318            o = null;
319         } else {
320            throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid data type {0} encountered for parse type {1}", dt, sType);
321         }
322      }
323
324      if (nn(swap) && nn(o))
325         o = unswap(swap, o, eType);
326
327      if (nn(outer))
328         setParent(eType, o, outer);
329
330      return (T)o;
331   }
332
333   @Override /* Overridden from ParserSession */
334   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
335      try (CborInputStream is = new CborInputStream(pipe)) {
336         return parseAnything(type, is, getOuter(), null);
337      }
338   }
339
340   /**
341    * Returns whether the next iteration of a CBOR container loop should run.
342    *
343    * <p>
344    * For definite-length containers (<c>len &gt;= 0</c>) returns <jk>true</jk> while
345    * <c>i &lt; len</c>.  For indefinite-length containers (<c>len == -1</c>) peeks for the BREAK
346    * marker and returns <jk>false</jk> when found (consuming the BREAK byte), <jk>true</jk>
347    * otherwise.
348    */
349   private static boolean shouldContinueContainer(CborInputStream is, long len, int i) throws IOException {
350      if (len == -1)
351         return !is.peekBreak();
352      return i < len;
353   }
354}
